entry.title: New: CR 25-19 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 3, CD1 (2024), to: (1) implement Section 10-3 of the Revised Charter of the County of Maui (1983), as amended, approved by the electorate at the 2022 General Election, and update the procedure for the filing of financial disclosure statements; and (2) increase security for County elections officials.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
